title: Opinion: Inside The "Rational Frenzy" Driving The AI Super-Cycle
summary_full: AI investment has become a macroeconomic fact in the West. The forces that make it impossible to escape are the same ones that have stopped the market from pricing it.
summary_public: AI investment has become a macroeconomic fact in the West. The forces that make it impossible to escape are the same ones that have stopped the market from pricing it.
